title: Kilo LSET18 Non-Scratch Scourer, Purpose, Environmentally Friendly Scrubby – Multi Colour Set of 2, One Size, 17x13cm
features: Kilo multi-purpose non-scratch non-abrasive scrubby is the ultimate all surface cleaning cloth
Safely clean cookware, non-stick surfaces, stainless steel, ceramic, sports clothing and equipment, vegetables, glass, outdoor furniture, garden tools and much more
Non scratch scrubby made from 100% cotton and requires no detergents.
Simply can be cleaned in the dishwasher, washing machine or by hand and reused many times.
The most versatile scrubby available for cleaning all around the home. Item colour and pattern may vary.
description: From the manufacturer Kilo - Affordable and Functional Kitchenware Kilo offers contemporary and innovative functional kitchen tools made from tough, high quality materials that will stand the test of time, providing unrivalled performance in any kitchen environment. Dishwasher and Washing Machine safe. Kilo Non-Scratch Eco Scourer, Cotton, Multi-Colour Multi-purpose non-scratch non-abrasive scrubby is the ultimate all surface cleaning cloth This highly useful Kilo scrubby is the best all surface cleaning cloth. Made from 100% cotton it can be used to safely clean a multitude of different surfaces and materials including pans, enamel cookware, ceramics, hobs, root vegetables, floor tiles, chrome, garden furniture and even dirt from your sports kit It is easy to clean, either by hand or putting it in the dishwasher. Non scratch scrubby made from 100% cotton and requires no detergents.
